name: multi-model-agents
description: AI Agent Swarm V1.4.10 simplifies docs into three user prompt entries while keeping the full Codex, Opus/Claude, Gemini, RAG, and visible subagent workflow.

interface.shortDescription: AI Agent Swarm V1.4.10: three prompt docs, Codex main control, Opus/Claude coding, Gemini test analysis, RAG, and visible subagents.
interface.longDescription: AI Agent Swarm V1.4.10 is a local Codex multi-model orchestration plugin for long-running development. Codex keeps planning, authorization, real tests, review integration, RAG writes, and final decisions. Opus/Claude performs primary coding inside authorized workspace boundaries after design plan-review. Gemini provides test strategy and failure-log analysis. This release simplifies docs into INSTALL_PROMPT, START_PROMPT, RELEASE_PROMPT, plus a docs navigation page.
capabilities: 本地项目记忆库（轻量 RAG）
defaultPrompt: 使用 AI Agent Swarm 处理这次代码修改，默认启用可见角色子智能体工作流。
